'''dayava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalocoele|encephalocoele]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalocoele|encephalocoele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dayava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyævæth|dæyævæth]] || [[word:dæyævæj|dæyævæj]] || [[word:dæyævæsh|dæyævæsh]] || [[word:dæyævæ|dæyævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayayavath|dayayavath]] || [[word:dayayavaj|dayayavaj]] || [[word:dayayavash|dayayavash]] || [[word:dayayava|dayayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayavath|dayavath]] || [[word:dayavaj|dayavaj]] || [[word:dayavash|dayavash]] || [[word:dayava|dayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayafvath|dayafvath]] || [[word:dayafvaj|dayafvaj]] || [[word:dayafvash|dayafvash]] || [[word:dayafvaf|dayafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayavatha|dayavatha]] || [[word:dayavaja|dayavaja]] || [[word:dayavasha|dayavasha]] || [[word:dayavaka|dayavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayavath|dayavath]] || [[word:dayavaj|dayavaj]] || [[word:dayavash|dayavash]] || [[word:dayava|dayava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayavathal|dayavathal]] || [[word:dayavajal|dayavajal]] || [[word:dayavashal|dayavashal]] || [[word:dayavakal|dayavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayavathatha|dayavathatha]] || [[word:dayavajaja|dayavajaja]] || [[word:dayavashasha|dayavashasha]] || [[word:dayavaka|dayavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayavathan|dayavathan]] || [[word:dayavajan|dayavajan]] || [[word:dayavashan|dayavashan]] || [[word:dayavakan|dayavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayavathaoro|dayavathaoro]] || [[word:dayavajaoro|dayavajaoro]] || [[word:dayavashaoro|dayavashaoro]] || [[word:dayavakaoro|dayavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
